chapter_title: 2 Assign a Student Support Group to the student
snippet: School principals must establish a Student Support Group (SSG) for every child and young person in out-of-home care. The aims of the SSG are to: A school must hold meetings on a termly basis, with extra meetings held at the request of the case manager and the parent, guardian and/or carer. The SSG is responsible for: The following is a list of relevant people that may attend SSGs:
